data.title: fix-bug skill not triggered when user says 'investigate/fix' an issue
data.description:
## Incident Overview
When a user says 'investigate this issue', 'fix this bug', or similar natural language without explicitly invoking /dso:fix-bug, the agent proceeds without the fix-bug skill workflow (TDD, bot-psychologist, scope-drift review). This causes inconsistent bug-fix quality — bugs fixed without the skill lack RED test, GREEN test cycle, bot-psychologist LLM-behavioral analysis, and scope-drift review. The fix-bug skill should be triggered whenever user intent matches bug investigation/fix, not just on explicit /dso:fix-bug invocations.
